svg.text: NØNOS OPERATING SYSTEM - COMPLETE ARCHITECTURE SPECIFICATION
Zero-Trust Microkernel with Capability-Based Security | Production Implementation
Target: x86_64-nonos-uefi | Version: 1.0.4 | Build: ZK-GROTH16 | License: AGPL-3.0
NONOS BOOTLOADER - UEFI Secure Boot with ZK Attestation Chain
↓ KERNEL HANDOFF - ExitBootServices() → Ring 0 Entry Point ↓
◆ USER/KERNEL SECURITY BOUNDARY - Ring 3 → Ring 0 Transition ◆
Core Mechanisms: Message passing | Capability transfer | Shared memory regions | Zero-copy buffers
Performance: Latency <100ns | Throughput 10GB/s | Lock-free queues | Asynchronous I/O framework
Security: Capability delegation protocol | Process isolation | Message authentication | Channel encryption
◆ CAPABILITY ENFORCEMENT LAYER - Zero-Trust Verification Engine ◆
◆ HARDWARE ABSTRACTION LAYER - Driver Isolation Boundary ◆
HARDWARE DRIVER SUBSYSTEM - Isolated Device Management Framework
CPU: x86_64 processors (Intel Xeon, Core i-series | AMD EPYC, Ryzen) • Memory: DDR4/DDR5 system RAM (ECC support)
Storage: NVMe PCIe Gen4 SSD, SATA 3.0 drives, M.2 form factor • Network: Gigabit Ethernet, 10GbE controllers
Graphics: Integrated GPU (Intel UHD, AMD APU), Discrete GPU support • Security: TPM 2.0 chips, Hardware RNG
I/O: USB 3.2 controllers, PS/2 interfaces • Timers: APIC, PIT, HPET • Power: ACPI management, thermal zones
NONOS Operating System - Complete Architecture Specification v1.0.4
Compliance: ISO/IEC 15408 (Common Criteria) | FIPS 140-2 Level 3 | POSIX.1-2017 | RFC Standards
Security Model: Zero-Trust Architecture | Capability-Based Access Control | Principle of Least Privilege
